channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Obama adviser discusses 'Battle for American Identity'
item.description: Ben Rhodes, a former speechwriter and security adviser for President Obama, explores American identity through 15 speeches in his book All We Say.

item.title: Food insecurity now exceeds pandemic peak levels
item.description: A new Federal Reserve Bank of New York survey shows more families face food insecurity now than during the coronavirus pandemic.

item.title: Key takeaways from Texas primary runoffs, and DOJ deletes Jan. 6 case data
item.description: Texas primary runoffs have ended, setting up major November matchups. The Justice Department under Trump has removed significant Jan. 6 case information.

item.title: Greetings from Cape Verde, where samba, jazz and morna fill the air
item.description: Music blends with daily life in this West African island nation, which hosted two international music festivals in April.
